name: Killer Grannies
overview: Killer Grannies is a true-crime documentary series on Oxygen True Crime that profiles shocking real-life cases where grandmothers turn into cold-blooded killers. Hosted by June Squibb, each self-contained episode follows investigators as they unravel the sinister plots and dark deeds of a seemingly innocent, maternal matriarch of a family.

trailers.title: Killer Grannies Hosted By June Squibb: Explore Grandmas’ Dark Side
